/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libtinygradc.dylib -install_name @rpath/libtinygradc.dylib CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/tg.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/tensor.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/arena.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/autograd.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/ops_basic.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/ops_nn.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/ops_loss.c.o CMakeFiles/tinygradc.dir/src/optim.c.o  -lm
